questionHtml: Identify with a reason the city where the plants were more insulated from freezing temperatures.
markschemeHtml:
Montreal because it has the lowest number of days below 0 °C without snow cover;

Do not award the mark for Montreal if the reason is not given.

meta.title: Identify with a reason the city where the plants were more insulated from freezing temperatures.
